example of usage:
Ontology: <http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ro/idrange/>
  Annotations: 
     'has ID prefix': "http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/RO_"
     'has ID digit count' : 7,
     rdfs:label "RO id policy"
     'has ID policy for': "RO"

description: Relates an ontology used to record id policy to the number of digits in the URI. The URI is: the 'has ID prefix" annotation property value concatenated with an integer in the id range (left padded with "0"s to make this many digits)
label: has ID digit count
